title: RoE in the UK Questions
wikitext:
[]: RoE in the UK + Questions             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sat Apr 20, 2013 11:51 am Hello everyone! Sorry if this has been discussed, or if a thread already exists on this subject, but I am desperate to know more information about the RoE series and its availability in the UK. I've seen several Blu-Rays on eBay for decent prices for 1.11 and 2.22. I know 3.33 will be released on BD in Japan on the 24th, so I'm curious as to how long it'll be before a R2 release for 3.33. I literally finished watching NGE 4 days ago, including the films and it's taken me those 4 days to get my head thinking straight. EoE absolutely molested my mind... Anyhow, I had seen information about the reboot during my time watching NGE and I'm very hesitant to even watch them due to... certain feelings. Ahem. So, I have a few questions regarding the reboot that will hopefully swing me one way or another: 1. Are the characters exactly the same? Example, is Shinji still an emo? Doe Rei have humanity/emotions/proper interactions this time? 2. Is everything explained? Example: is SEELE given proper background? Are Gendo's motives fully explored? 3. Is the story-line better or just as good? Example: Is everything just a means to an end or does everything have depth and substance? 4. Am I going to be mind-raped again? Any and all information appreciated, as long as there's not too many spoilers. Thanks~!

[]: Re: RoE in the UK + Questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 20, 2013 12:08 pm 1. The characters range from being essentially the same to slightly different. How much you notice depends on how sensitive and analytical you are to the changes. They're recognizable, any which way. 2. We won't know how much ends up explained until the series is completed, but, so far, things are much the same as in the original series. That is, the more effort you put into deciphering mysterious dialogue and extracting easily-missed visual clues from scenes, and so forth, the more of the massive puzzle you'll be able to piece together. 3. The story relies heavily on its predecessor for a lot of its resonances. This isn't necessarily a bad thing, though. I'd say NME ("Rebuild") has its own strengths and weaknesses, just like the original. 4. Probably.

[]: Re: RoE in the UK + Questions             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 20, 2013 12:13 pm ﻿＞so I'm curious as to how long it'll be before a R2 release for 3.33. Japanese DVDs are region 2. Ripping the video and attaching English language subtitles is left as an exercise for the reader. I don't expect a Manga UK release before the end of next year at the earliest. ﻿＞1. Are the characters exactly the same? No; Anno is on record as stating that the character background details have changed (and not just the backgrounds -- Asuka is now Captain Shikinami of the EU Airforce), and the voice actors have stated in interview that they have been directed to play characters in a different manner to the original. Additionally, there is a new pilot added to the cast. ﻿＞2. Is everything explained? Of course not. We have one more movie to go, for one thing. ﻿＞3. Is the story-line better or just as good? It depends who you ask. ﻿＞4. Am I going to be mind-raped again? It depends. There were a lot of people in an emotionally dazed state after seeing the latest movie, and that only gets us to the equivalent of episode 24, give or take -- we still have End of Rebuild to come.

[]: Re: RoE in the UK + Questions             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Apr 20, 2013 3:04 pm Mr. Tines wrote: ﻿>4. Am I going to be mind-raped again? It depends. There were a lot of people in an emotionally dazed state after seeing the latest movie, and that only gets us to the equivalent of episode 24, give or take -- we still have End of Rebuild to come.

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 10:29 am Just finished watching 1.11 and 2.22 back-to-back. OMG WOW. That's all I can honestly say right this moment. Anyone in doubt about watching these two films should do so immediately! Can't wait for 3.33!

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Apr 21, 2013 10:59 am alexsan1991x wrote: Can't wait for 3.33!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Apr 21, 2013 11:10 am alexsan1991x wrote: Can't wait for 3.33!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 21, 2013 11:27 am alexsan1991x wrote: Can't wait for 3.33!

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:03 pm Okay, now I'm a little bit more worried... o_____o'' And wow... so many characters I can't identify. Oh God, my mind can't take another rape!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:23 pm alexsan1991x wrote: And wow... so many characters I can't identify.

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:25 pm Stop laughing at meh~~~! Please tell me the mindfuck isn't THAT bad... T_T I've guessed at most of the characters but still... At least 3.33 is only a few days away. Hopefully a subbed torrent will pop up soon after. *Wishful thinking?*

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:26 pm alexsan1991x wrote: Okay, now I'm a little bit more worried... Oh God, my mind can't take another rape!

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:27 pm Giji Shinka wrote: Don't worry. 4.0 is PROBABLY going to have less mindfuck ending and more happy one.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:28 pm alexsan1991x wrote: I've guessed at most of the characters but still... At least 3.33 is only a few days away.

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:30 pm ElMariachi wrote: Hey, PM me your guesses to see how many you got right(I'm not gonna spoil you the movie don't worry!)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:33 pm Character guessing game goes here : http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12270/New-Evangelion-Characters-NO-SPOILERS/0/

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Apr 21, 2013 1:05 pm alexsan1991x wrote: Okay, now I'm a little bit more worried... o_____o'' And wow... so many characters I can't identify. Oh God, my mind can't take another rape!

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 1:48 pm Yeah, I knew there'd be something right at the end. Looks like stuff gunna get messy! :P

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Apr 21, 2013 2:54 pm alexsan1991x wrote: Looks like stuff gunna get messy! :P

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Sun Apr 21, 2013 3:23 pm ElMariachi wrote: You don't have any idea...
